children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In carrying out a disposition study for a project of the Corps of Engineers, including a disposition study under or an assessment under section 6002 of the Water Resources Reform and Development Act of 2014 (; ), the Secretary shall consider the extent to which the property concerned has economic, cultural, historic, or recreational significance or impacts at the national, State, or local level.section 549a of this titlePublic Law 113–121128 Stat. 1349

children.heading: Completion of assessment and inventory
children.label: b Completion of assessment and inventory
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall complete the assessment and inventory required under section 6002(a) of the Water Resources Reform and Development Act of 2014 (; ).December 16, 2016Public Law 113–121128 Stat. 1349
